## Scope

- [ ] The change has one clear owner and does not alter frozen Topic 1/2/3 contracts.
- [ ] Breaking wire changes use a new schema major version.

## Verification

- [ ] Python tests pass.
- [ ] Ruff passes with zero findings.
- [ ] Go contracts compile and test.
- [ ] TypeScript and Vue type checks pass.
- [ ] Database migrations include upgrade and downgrade validation when applicable.
- [ ] Security, tenant isolation, audit, and recovery behavior were reviewed.

- Rollback procedure:
- Configuration or migration impact:
- Observability and alert impact:
